name: mobile-code-companion
description: Control VS Code and your Claude Code agent from your phone: watch the chat, approve permissions, answer questions, and send prompts remotely.

commands.title: Mobile Companion: New Hosted Claude Session
Mobile Companion: Install Claude Code Hooks (Companion Mode)
Mobile Companion: Uninstall Claude Code Hooks

mobileCompanion.port.description: HTTP/WebSocket port for the phone to connect to.

mobileCompanion.bindHost.description: Interface to bind. Use 127.0.0.1 to disable LAN access (tunnel-only setups).

mobileCompanion.autoStart.description: Start the companion server automatically when VS Code opens.

mobileCompanion.approvalTimeoutSeconds.description: How long a hosted-session permission request waits for an answer before the default action applies.

mobileCompanion.approvalTimeoutAction.description: What happens when a hosted-session approval times out.

mobileCompanion.hookApprovalTimeoutSecon.description: How long a hook-forwarded permission request (official panel / terminal CLI session) waits before falling back to the normal desktop dialog.

mobileCompanion.askUserQuestionStrategy.description: How phone answers are fed back to AskUserQuestion. updatedInput is the documented SDK path; denyWithAnswer is a version-proof fallback.

mobileCompanion.defaultPermissionMode.description: Permission mode for new hosted sessions.

mobileCompanion.model.description: Optional model override for hosted sessions (empty = Claude Code default).

mobileCompanion.historyLimit.description: Messages kept per session for reconnect snapshots.

mobileCompanion.ntfyUrl.description: Optional ntfy topic URL (e.g. https://ntfy.sh/my-topic) used to push notifications even when the web app is closed.
